---
title: "Reports Library"
subtitle: "Full pipeline reports — per company × year, latest run only"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(here); library(reactable); library(htmltools)
source(here("R", "load_evidence.R"))
source(here("R", "plot_themes.R"))
source(here("R", "download_helpers.R"))

report_files <- find_latest_report_mds()

classify_status <- function(x) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    is.na(x)                              ~ "No data",
    grepl("None|No SDG",    x)           ~ "No evidence",
    grepl("Strong",         x)           ~ "Strong",
    grepl("Substantial|Moderate", x)     ~ "Moderate",
    TRUE                                 ~ "Partial"
  )
}

status_colours <- c(
  "Strong"      = "#19486A",
  "Moderate"    = "#3F7E44",
  "Partial"     = "#FCC30B",
  "No evidence" = "#E5243B",
  "No data"     = "#aaaaaa"
)
```

Click **▶** on any row in the index to read the full report inline.
Expand individual years in the full-text section below to see the complete output.

---

## Report index

```{r report-index}
report_tbl <- run_meta |>
  left_join(
    report_files |> dplyr::select(company, year, report_md),
    by = c("company" = "company", "report_year" = "year")
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(company, report_year) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    status      = classify_status(overall_assessment),
    report_year = as.integer(report_year)
  )

# Pre-render report markdown to HTML strings (stored as hidden column).
# JS details function returns a string → reactable inserts it as innerHTML.
render_report_html <- function(md_path) {
  if (is.na(md_path) || !file.exists(md_path)) {
    return('<p style="padding:12px;color:#999;">Report file not found for this run.</p>')
  }
  inner <- commonmark::markdown_html(
    paste(readLines(md_path, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n")
  )
  paste0(
    '<div style="padding:16px 24px;background:#f8f9fa;',
    'border-left:4px solid #19486A;max-height:600px;overflow-y:auto;"',
    ' class="report-content">', inner, '</div>'
  )
}

disp_tbl <- report_tbl |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    Company      = stringr::str_to_title(company),
    Year         = report_year,
    Report       = dplyr::coalesce(report_name, "—"),
    Status       = status,
    Valid        = n_valid,
    Rejected     = n_rejected,
    `Rej. %`     = scales::percent(rejection_rate, accuracy = 1),
    .report_html = sapply(report_md, render_report_html)
  )

make_download_bar(
  disp_tbl |> dplyr::select(-.report_html),
  "reports_index"
)
reactable(
  disp_tbl,

  details = JS("function(rowInfo) {
    return React.createElement('div', {
      dangerouslySetInnerHTML: { __html: rowInfo.values['.report_html'] }
    })
  }"),

  columns = list(
    Company      = colDef(maxWidth = 120),
    Year         = colDef(maxWidth = 65,  align = "center"),
    Report       = colDef(minWidth = 220),
    Status       = colDef(maxWidth = 115, align = "center",
      cell = function(v) {
        div(
          style = paste0(
            "background:", status_colours[v], ";",
            "color:white;padding:2px 10px;border-radius:10px;",
            "font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;display:inline-block;"
          ),
          v
        )
      }
    ),
    Valid        = colDef(maxWidth = 65,  align = "center"),
    Rejected     = colDef(maxWidth = 80,  align = "center"),
    `Rej. %`     = colDef(maxWidth = 75,  align = "center"),
    .report_html = colDef(show = FALSE)
  ),

  defaultSorted   = list(Year = "asc"),
  striped         = TRUE,
  highlight       = TRUE,
  compact         = TRUE,
  defaultPageSize = 15
)
```

---

## Full reports — all years

Each accordion entry contains the complete pipeline report for that run.

```{r full-reports}
# Build accordion using htmltools — avoids Pandoc raw-HTML/blank-line issues
htmltools::tagList(
  lapply(seq_len(nrow(report_files)), function(i) {
    yr <- report_files$year[i]
    co <- stringr::str_to_title(report_files$company[i])
    md <- report_files$report_md[i]

    meta_row <- report_tbl |>
      dplyr::filter(company == report_files$company[i], report_year == yr)
    status <- if (nrow(meta_row) > 0) meta_row$status[1] else "No data"
    sc     <- status_colours[status]

    badge <- tags$span(
      style = paste0(
        "background:", sc, ";color:white;",
        "padding:2px 10px;border-radius:10px;",
        "font-size:0.76rem;font-weight:600;margin-left:12px;"
      ),
      status
    )

    body <- if (file.exists(md)) {
      HTML(commonmark::markdown_html(
        paste(readLines(md, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n")
      ))
    } else {
      tags$p(style = "color:#999;font-style:italic;",
             "Report file not available for this run.")
    }

    tags$details(
      style = "margin-bottom:0.6rem;",
      tags$summary(
        style = paste0(
          "cursor:pointer;padding:10px 16px;",
          "background:#f0f4f8;border-left:4px solid #19486A;",
          "font-size:0.93rem;font-weight:600;list-style:revert;"
        ),
        paste0(co, " \u00b7 ", yr), badge
      ),
      div(
        class = "report-content",
        style = "padding:16px 24px;border:1px solid #dde3ea;border-top:none;",
        body
      )
    )
  })
)
```
